response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled three distinct song tracks ('Mirai Campanella', 'Ame to Petra', and 'Gunjou Sanka'). All spoken/sung Japanese vocals were manually transcribed and matched correctly with original song phonetics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated vocals manually since no lyric references were provided. Included translation of visual title cards ('Rain and Petra' and 'Ultramarine Anthem') during instrumental silence. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all segments precisely, keeping durations tightly bound to the vocal waveforms and cleanly separating blocks during instrumental segments.

subtitles.original: 響くカンパネラ...
subtitles.english: The resounding campanella...

subtitles.original: 新しい未来を感じてる
subtitles.english: I can feel a new future.

subtitles.original: コンパクトにまとまって
subtitles.english: Packing light,

subtitles.original: 進むしかないでしょう
subtitles.english: we have no choice but to move forward, right?

subtitles.original: 遠くまで
subtitles.english: To somewhere far away...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more!

subtitles.original: 届けこの祈りよ光となれ
subtitles.english: Reach out, this prayer, and become light!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more...

subtitles.original: 少しずつでもいい私という答えを
subtitles.english: Even if it's little by little, show me the answer that is myself!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more, more!

subtitles.original: 雨とペトラ
subtitles.english: [Title: Rain and Petra]

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った いつか空は 灰になって落ちるって
subtitles.english: Someone said that one day the sky will turn to ash and fall.

subtitles.original: 妄想の世の中で 日々を喰らっている
subtitles.english: In this world of delusions, I am devouring my days.

subtitles.original: 境界線を引いてしまうのも 共感性のせいにして
subtitles.english: Blaming even drawing a boundary line on empathy,

subtitles.original: 街の灯の海で 居場所を探している
subtitles.english: I'm searching for a place to belong in the sea of city lights.

subtitles.original: 何処へ行くにも この足は 退屈に染まって動かない
subtitles.english: No matter where I go, these feet are stained with boredom and won't move.

subtitles.original: 少しだけ先の
subtitles.english: I just want to see

subtitles.original: 景色が見たいだけなのにな
subtitles.english: the scenery just a little bit ahead, and yet...

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely

subtitles.original: 頬を濡らしてしまう
subtitles.english: it will wet my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 枯れてしまった色ですら 愛しくなるのに
subtitles.english: Even though withered colors would become dear to me,

subtitles.original: 目を瞑ったら 目を瞑ったらもっと
subtitles.english: if I close my eyes, if I close my eyes, even more

subtitles.original: 遠く霞んでしまう
subtitles.english: will fade far away into a haze.

subtitles.original: うるさくなった雨の音 笑い飛ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Please laugh away the sound of the rain that has grown loud.

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った いつか溜息は
subtitles.english: Someone said that one day sighs

subtitles.original: 夜に化けて歌を歌う
subtitles.english: will turn into the night and sing songs.

subtitles.original: 妄想の世の中で 日々を喰らっている
subtitles.english: In this world of delusions, I am devouring my days.

subtitles.original: 優しい嘘を なぞったせいで
subtitles.english: Because I traced a gentle lie,

subtitles.original: 離れる声に気付かない
subtitles.english: I don't notice the voice growing distant.

subtitles.original: 溶けた月が 足元に落ちて
subtitles.english: The melted moon falls to my feet,

subtitles.original: 静かに揺れていた
subtitles.english: quietly swaying.

subtitles.original: 夜が降ったら 夜が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If night falls, if night falls, surely

subtitles.original: 今日を責めてしまう
subtitles.english: I will blame today.

subtitles.original: 満たされない日々の底で 夢を見ているだけ
subtitles.english: Just dreaming at the bottom of these unfulfilled days.

subtitles.original: 目を逸らしても 目を逸らしてもずっと
subtitles.english: Even if I look away, even if I look away, forever

subtitles.original: 後悔と愛の隙間
subtitles.english: in the gap between regret and love...

subtitles.original: 取り残されてしまう前に 手を伸ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Before I get left behind, reach out your hand to me.

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely...

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely...

subtitles.original: 湿るアスファルト背に写して 俯いた
subtitles.english: Reflecting the damp asphalt on my back, I looked down.

subtitles.original: 独りぼっちでまた 明日に期待をして
subtitles.english: All alone, looking forward to tomorrow again.

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely

subtitles.original: 頬を濡らしてしまう
subtitles.english: it will wet my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 枯れてしまった色ですら 愛しくなるのに
subtitles.english: Even though withered colors would become dear to me,

subtitles.original: 目を瞑ったら 目を瞑ったらもっと
subtitles.english: if I close my eyes, if I close my eyes, even more

subtitles.original: 遠く霞んでしまう
subtitles.english: will fade far away into a haze.

subtitles.original: うるさくなった雨の音 笑い飛ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Please laugh away the sound of the rain that has grown loud.

subtitles.original: 群青讃歌
subtitles.english: [Title: Ultramarine Anthem]
